holdings.infoBox: RING is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Newmont stock at 16.17%, Agnico Eagle Mines at 12.38%, Barrick Mining at 9.14%, Wheaton Precious Metals at 7.25%, and AngloGold Ashanti at 4.78%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Global Gold Miners ETF (RING) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI ACWI Select Gold Miners IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of companies that generate revenue primarily from gold mining. RING was launched on Jan 31, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI ACWI Select Gold Miners IMI

data.title: US natural gas futures rise as demand outlook strengthens
data.text: U.S. natural gas futures climbed about ​3% on Wednesday on forecasts for hotter-than-normal weather and more demand over the next two weeks than previously expected.

data.title: Miner ETFs shine as gold and silver notch a winning July
data.text: Precious-metals exchange-traded funds powered higher Friday as investors continued to bid up gold and silver.
